name: manage_dns_records
description: Set and retrieve DNS host records for a domain. You can manage A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT, and other record types through this capability.

parameters.name: Command
parameters.description: Use 'namecheap.domains.dns.getHosts' to get records or 'namecheap.domains.dns.setHosts' to set them.

response_example.body: <ApiResponse Status="OK"><CommandResponse><DomainDNSGetHostsResult><host HostId="1" Name="@" Type="A" Address="198.51.100.4" MXPref="10" TTL="1800" /></DomainDNSGetHostsResult></CommandResponse></ApiResponse>
